description: §18.0.1 — a block `<match for=Type on=expr>` at ordinary MARKUP position (not inside a `${ ... lift ... }` loop) is recognized by the BS-layer match-block builder (builds a `match-block` node), so the unrecognized-lift-block signal is absent and E-MATCH-BLOCK-IN-LIFT SHALL NOT fire. Acceptance sibling of e-match-block-in-lift-pos: proves the lift-context detector is scoped to the lift path and does not over-fire on the normal markup-position block-`<match>`.
rationale: §18.0.1: a markup-position block-`<match>` compiles via the recognized match-block path; only the inline-markup/lift-loop path produces the residual `markup tag=match` node that E-MATCH-BLOCK-IN-LIFT keys on.
